name: @declarative-hex-worlds/examples
description: Reference examples that exercise every declarative-hex-worlds renderer binding. A shared renderer-free game (src/game) is rendered by each binding example (src/three via /three, src/canvas2d via /canvas2d). Not published; it is the library's real-world exerciser + the source of the docs-site live islands and visual-verification showcases.

scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome lint src tests
